command: Step 1: Click on the Maestro app in the dock to bring it to focus. Step 2: In the left sidebar click on 'Magic Puffs'. Step 3: Look for a panel toggle button in the top right area of Maestro and click it to open the right panel. Step 4: In the right panel click the tab labeled 'Auto Run'. Step 5: Click the button labeled 'Run' which has a play triangle icon. Step 6: A dialog will appear - click the 'Go' button in that dialog.
